metadata.label: gen2/Cisco-NetworkingSenior
metadata.title: Senior Software Engineer- Networking Technologies
metadata.team_direction: Cisco is a leading technology company that is revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations

revision_priority: Rewrite the Professional Summary into exactly 3 sentence-style lines with bold headers, keeping the same content but removing the bullet format.
Add one explicit networking-systems cue in the TikTok section so Cisco sees direct networking evidence instead of only adjacent release-validation language.
portfolio_review.revision_instructions: 1) Replace the current `## Professional Summary` bullet list with exactly 3 standalone sentences. Each sentence should begin with a bold header and a colon, and each should end with a period. Keep the existing claims about Java/Go/C++/Python, Linux, gRPC/Kafka/CI/CD, and the Go pattern-recognition line; this is a formatting fix, not a content rewrite. 2) In the TikTok experience, edit one of the first two bullets so the networking work is explicit at the systems level. Use wording such as packet parsing, socket/protocol edge cases, or state-machine validation, while keeping the same scope and metrics. Do not remove C++, Linux, Python, or Networking from Skills; the fix should be additive and surgical.

findings.issue: Key scope/result numbers are left in plain text, so the eye does not land on the strongest evidence quickly enough. Examples include 11 minutes to 4 minutes, 24%, 98.7%, 31%, 13-person, 20+ city, 140+ weekly users, and 7 hours per week.
findings.fix: Bold the highest-value metric or scope tokens inside each bullet, especially the before/after numbers and team/user scale markers.

findings.field: TikTok project baseline; DiDi project baseline
findings.issue: Modifier language is being bolded, which the style rule explicitly discourages. `team-maintained` is emphasized in the project background lines.
findings.fix: Remove bold from modifiers and keep emphasis on technical nouns, ownership nouns, and measurable results.

findings.issue: The opening frames the candidate as transitioning from analytics instead of leading with the target role/domain, which weakens first-scan clarity.
findings.fix: Rewrite the first sentence to open with a role-led headline such as backend or systems-focused engineering, then mention the analytics background as supporting context.

findings.field: Professional Summary; TikTok Software Engineer Intern section
findings.issue: Cisco is a specialized networking-technologies role, but the resume only shows adjacent backend/security/data work plus generic networking-adjacent validation language. It does not yet show direct IOS-XR, router/switch, TCP/IP, NPU, or kernel-module ownership evidence.
findings.fix: Add one bullet in the most relevant experience that states the actual networking substrate owned, the protocol or validation surface, and the concrete outcome; if that work did not happen, this is a structural mismatch for the target JD.

findings.issue: The latest experience is almost entirely tier-2 impact language: time reduction, false-positive reduction, rollback rate, and validation-time reduction. There is no tier-1 scope marker to carry senior networking credibility.
findings.fix: If true, add one tier-1 scope signal such as service/event volume, test-surface size, ownership breadth, or team/system scale; otherwise compress one of the percentage claims and foreground the system boundary.

revision_priority: [MUST] Recast the opening Summary as role-led and domain-led, not transition-led.
[MUST] Surface direct networking-substrate evidence in the TikTok section, or treat this Cisco role as a structural mismatch.
[SHOULD] Add one concrete scope/ownership metric to the TikTok internship section if it is true.
[NICE] Tighten emphasis rules by bolding key metrics and removing bold from modifiers like team-maintained.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] If the networking work is real, rewrite the strongest TikTok bullet to name the actual Linux/networking substrate owned (protocol path, kernel-module validation, router/switch/NPU-facing checks, or IOS-XR/fabric if applicable) and the concrete validation outcome. Rewrite the Summary opening to lead with the target role/domain instead of "transitioning from analytics." Add one tier-1 scope metric in the TikTok section if true. Remove bold from modifiers like team-maintained and reserve bold for technical nouns and key metrics.
